notes: Parent class for all sulfur compounds; covers sulfate, sulfite, thiosulfate, elemental sulfur; CHEBI:26833 (sulfur atom) was wrong, CHEBI:26835 confirmed as sulfur molecular entity
Amorphous iron oxide = ferrihydrite (CHEBI:192761); CHEBI:82594 was Ferritin (a protein), completely wrong; CHEBI:50819 (ferric oxide) is crystalline hematite, not amorphous
Fe(III)-EDTA complex used in electron transport studies; CHEBI:42191 was EDTA(4-) (free ligand, no iron), wrong; CHEBI:30729 confirmed as the iron complex
Variant spelling of iron(III) oxyhydroxide; ferrihydrite = amorphous Fe(III) oxyhydroxide; CHEBI:82594 was Ferritin (wrong)
METPO:2000605 (oxidizes in darkness) predicate confirmed in metpo.owl; CHEBI:26833 (sulfur atom) was wrong, CHEBI:26835 is sulfur molecular entity
